ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy football team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team owner */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL for the team logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team owner */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the owner joined the league */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the team owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the team owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matchup */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season during which the matchup occurred */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season when the matchup took place */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the matchup */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the matchup */,
  "team1_score" REAL /* Score of the first team in the matchup */,
  "team2_score" REAL /* Score of the second team in the matchup */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the matchup occurred */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  "match_winner" INTEGER /* Winner of the match (if completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_week FOREIGN KEY ("week") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the fantasy football season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the season */,
  "champion" INTEGER /* Champion of the season (if completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season this week belongs to */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number within the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  "week_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "points" REAL /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team in the league */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the team */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current win or loss streak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "points_scored" REAL /* Points scored by the player */,
  "stats_details" TEXT /* Additional statistics about the player's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the transaction */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, waiver pickup) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matchup being predicted */,
  "predicted_team1_score" REAL /* Predicted score for the first team */,
  "predicted_team2_score" REAL /* Predicted score for the second team */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (read/unread) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "user_notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (read/unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_notification_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_id") REFERENCES notifications ("notification_id")
)
